trajectory.reasoning:
WHAT YOU FOUND: The Comments History / Staff Notes section contains no entries documenting a product mismatch, prior complaints, return authorization, or staff investigation. Order details show 1 item shipped (SKU: PRODUCT-001), Order Status Complete, Grand Total $106.27, Total Refunded $0.00.
WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order #000000761 → Order View → Comments History section; Order Totals and Items Ordered sections on the same page.
WHY IT MATTERS: The customer claims a different product was received, but there is no supporting note, photo reference, RMA, or staff verification in the Comments History. Without documented evidence or prior investigation, the refund cannot be approved outright and requires escalation for verification.
